name: HWR_FLW_STEP_B
description: The step table is used to store steps.

columns.Name: STEP_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key of the step table.

columns.Name: FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: The flow id of the flow containing this step.

columns.Name: UUID
columns.Comments: This is the generated instance identifier associated to this step.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: The display name value for the step.

columns.Name: FLOW_COMP_UUID
columns.Comments: The flow component identifier of this step.

columns.Name: STEP_CONFIG
columns.Comments: This is the serialized step configuration.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
